if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimStatusHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS claim_status_cd_nm FROM odh_claim_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = h.claim_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = h.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CLAIM_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = h.claim_status_cd WHERE h.claim_status_hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimStatusHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS claim_status_cd_nm FROM odh_claim_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = h.claim_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = h.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CLAIM_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = h.claim_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimStatusHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , ord.member_nm AS order_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS claim_status_cd_nm FROM odh_claim_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = h.claim_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = h.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CLAIM_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = h.claim_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimStatusHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM odh_claim_status_hist h
